title: Faith Killen
compiled_truth: Faith Killen is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-25 to 2002-02-13), Faith Killen sent 67 and received 230 emails, totalling 297 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (64), [Wes Colwell](people/wes-colwell) (16), [Tammie Schoppe](people/tammie-schoppe) (7), [Beth Perlman](people/beth-perlman) (4), [Raymond Bowen](people/raymond-bowen) (3).
